subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath aided to serve His binding Word! Through Jinab-i-Tafti I received thy letter penned by thine own hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ایده الله علی خدمه کلمته المطاعه بواسطه جناب تفتی نامه ای بخط خویش
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
